About Me

I'm Reina, an Operations and GTM specialist. If you are a leader with too much on your plate or a team with big plans, I come in with the right support and execution to get things done.

From outbound pipelines and workflow automations to day-to-day ops support, I take care of the behind-the-scenes work so you can focus on what matters most.

My Work

See it in action

Real screenshots from real projects. CRM builds, ClickUp setups, outbound systems and more.

ClickUp Setup & Automation

ClickUp Workspace Builds

Built out full ClickUp workspaces including a social media content board, operational logs tracker, and a customer onboarding pipeline with custom fields and automated workflows.

Lead Generation

Lead Generation Systems

Built end-to-end lead generation systems from prospecting databases and outreach tracking to results summaries with open rates, bounces, and response tracking across batches.

Creative Design

Social Media & Creative Assets

Designed social media graphics, promotional flyers, and branded content for small businesses from product launches and payment reminders to seasonal campaigns and brand identity posts.
